sections.title: Sydney Carter's Impact
sections.content: Sydney Carter, assistant coach and director of player development at the University of Texas at Austin, is known for her unique courtside fashion and has faced criticism in the past. She continues to inspire her team, including player Aaliyah Moore. Carter uses fashion to express herself and inspire her players.

sections.title: Texas Longhorns in NCAA Final Four
sections.content: The Texas Longhorns women's basketball team ended a 22-year drought by making it to the Final Four, defeating TCU 58-47. They will face the South Carolina Gamecocks in the semifinals, having previously faced them thrice this season.

sections.title: Predictions and Analysis
sections.content: The article includes predictions for the Texas vs South Carolina game in the Final Four, highlighting the performances of key players like Madison Booker and Rori Harmon. South Carolina Gamecocks are favored to win.

sections.title: Men's Basketball Program Changes
sections.content: Texas fired Rodney Terry, hiring Sean Miller, following an early exit from the NCAA Tournament. Texas named as a finalist for transfer Nick Davidson. The team has seen some changes post-coach firing.

Texas Longhorns men's basketball coach changes

articleDetails.title: Sydney Sweeney and Glen Powell's Outing Amid Her 'Rocky' Relationship with Jonathan Davino
articleDetails.summary: Sydney Sweeney was recently seen attending Glen Powell's sister's wedding in Texas shortly after reports surfaced about her split from fiancé Jonathan Davino. This outing has fueled public speculation about her relationship with Glen Powell, although sources state they are just friends.
notablePoints: Sweeney was photographed in a light blue gown at Leslie Powell's wedding.
The dress color matched the bridesmaids, suggesting a close association with the bridal party.
Rumors about Sweeney and Powell dating have circulated, but they have denied them.
Sweeney is reported to have called off her engagement to Jonathan Davino due to career pressures.
The couple has faced challenges due to Sweeney's busy schedule and career focus.

publicResponse.reaction: Pictures shared of Sweeney and Powell in Dallas, suggesting close ties.
Comparisons drawn between real-life events and the plot of 'Anyone But You.'

key_points.point: Sydney Carter, a Texas Longhorns assistant coach and former WNBA player, is known for her unique courtside fashion.
Carter faced criticism for her fashion choices, particularly as a Black woman in a power position, but has since become celebrated for them.
Her style has influenced and inspired her players, including Aaliyah Moore.
Carter frequently shares her gameday looks on Instagram, where she has 1.5 million followers.

Sophomore forward Madison Booker scored 18 points, and senior guard Rori Harmon added 13 points.

articles.headline: Texas Longhorns coach Sydney Carter used to be criticized for her courtside looks. Now she's celebrated for them.
articles.content:
As assistant coach and director of player development at the University of Texas at Austin, Sydney Carter has played a critical role in bringing its women’s basketball team to the elite eight in 2025’s NCAA Tournament. In addition to demonstrating her coaching prowess, Carter, a retired WNBA player, has also attracted widespread attention for her game day looks.

Carter’s courtside style hasn’t always been celebrated. In fact, the 34-year-old Texas Longhorns coach has been criticized for choosing to use fashion as a means of self-expression on the court.

“I just think that people are uncomfortable with a Black woman being in a power position,” Carter told Yahoo Life in 2022. “When you see a Black woman who is actually confident and embracing herself, I think that that’s very intimidating.”

Criticism against Carter and her game-day style hit a fever pitch on Feb. 6, 2022, when the Texas A&M Aggies faced off against the Kentucky Wildcats. Carter stepped onto the Memorial Coliseum court in Lexington, Ky., wearing bubblegum-pink patent leather pants, a ribbed, white turtleneck and nude heels with clear vinyl straps, which some viewers questioned as “appropriate as a basketball coach.”

Carter started dressing up for games during the coronavirus pandemic, driven by her comfort and personal expression. Carter is known for sharing her gameday looks on social media, often using fashion to nod to her home state of Texas.

articles.headline: Texas wins Lone Star State showdown over TCU to advance to fourth women’s Final Four
articles.content:
The Texas Longhorns are heading to the Final Four of the women’s NCAA basketball tournament for the fourth time in program history and first since 2003. No. 1 seed Texas topped No. 2 seed Texas Christian University 58-47 in the Elite Eight on Monday in Birmingham, Alabama.

It was a defensive battle in the first half. Texas led 23-21 at the half as it held TCU to its lowest-scoring first half this season. Senior guard Hailey Van Lith finished with 17 points for TCU, while sophomore forward Madison Booker led the way for Texas with 18 points.

The Longhorns will next face the reigning national champion and No. 1 seed South Carolina Gamecocks on Friday at Amalie Arena in Tampa, Florida.

articles.headline: South Carolina women's basketball vs Texas prediction, pick for 2025 NCAA Tournament Final Four
articles.author: Lulu Kesin
articles.content:
The No. 1 Gamecocks (34-3) will face No. 1 Texas on Friday in the Final Four, the fifth consecutive trip for coach Dawn Staley's team. The Gamecocks are 2-1 against Texas this season.

Junior center Kyla Oldacre was significant in Texas' win vs. TCU, and could be an X-factor against South Carolina. Starting point guard Rori Harmon is also key for Texas.

Prediction: South Carolina 68, Texas 56. Staley's squad hasn't quite soared yet this tournament, a motivation to play more fluidly and be more productive on the big stage.

articles.headline: Texas Named a Finalist For Elite Transfer
articles.content: Texas was named a finalist for Nevada transfer Nick Davidson. Davidson is also considering the Virginia Cavaliers, Washington Huskies, Notre Dame Fighting Irish and Clemson Tigers. Terry's replacement was former Xavier head coach Sean Miller.

articles.headline: Texas Longhorns end 22-year Final Four drought with win over TCU in Elite Eight
articles.content:
For the first time since 2003, the Texas Longhorns women’s basketball team is headed to the Final Four. Texas defeated TCU 58-47 Monday in the Elite Eight at Legacy Arena in Birmingham, Alabama. The Longhorns broke the program record for wins in a season with 35.

Despite 6-foot-7 post Sedona Prince fouling out, the Horned Frogs made a run cutting the Texas lead to 53-47. However, Texas managed a decisive win with Madison Booker's performance. The Longhorns are set to face South Carolina on April 4.

articles.headline: Final Four 2025: Who does Texas play next in NCAA Tournament?
articles.content:
The Final Four will be a doubleheader Friday with the winner moving on to the national title game next Monday. The winner of Texas-South Carolina will play with UCLA, Southern Cal, or UConn.

Date: Friday, April 4
Location: Amalie Arena in Tampa, Fla.
TV: ESPN

articles.title: South Carolina women's basketball vs Texas prediction, pick for 2025 NCAA Tournament Final Four
articles.content: The South Carolina Gamecocks, a No. 1 seed, will face the Texas Longhorns in the Final Four. Texas, another No. 1 seed, topped No. 2 seed TCU in the Elite Eight. articles.content: In the Final Four, Texas will face South Carolina, the reigning national champions. The matchup is part of a doubleheader which will lead to the national title game. Texas and South Carolina split their previous matchups during the regular season.

style_moments.event: Texas A&M vs. Kentucky Wildcats game
style_moments.outfit: Bubblegum-pink patent leather pants, ribbed white turtleneck, nude heels with clear vinyl straps
style_moments.note: Worn for Cancer Awareness game night. It was criticized but highlighted as a celebration of Breast Cancer Awareness Month.

style_moments.outfit: Cherry red, snake-printed Balmain suit and black Saint Laurent pumps
Light pink, Gucci logo knit top with matching pink trousers
Strapless red latex dress with three-dimensional hearts, white button-up, red-and-white striped sandals

impact: Carter's fashion sense has inspired the women she coaches, including Texas Longhorns forward Aaliyah Moore.
Her choice to dress up for games began during the coronavirus pandemic and was encouraged by a former coach.

social_media.description: Carter frequently posts photos of her game-day outfits on Instagram.

quotes.quote: I just think that people are uncomfortable with a Black woman being in a power position... When you see a Black woman who is actually confident and embracing herself, I think that that’s very intimidating.
I’m still getting my job done at the end of the day, and not once have I been hindered in wearing high heels or leather pants.
You wear what you want to wear. You don’t let anybody tell you that this is too much or this is extra.
I can’t leave my curves at home at the end of the day. I have to be authentically myself every day because it’s all I have.
At the end of the day, I want to be on the right side of everything. And when I’m putting on my clothes, that’s my superpower.

articles.title: Sydney Sweeney poses with Glen Powell's sister in new photo as co-stars reunite at wedding in Texas
articles.details: Sydney Sweeney attended the wedding of her co-star Glen Powell's sister, Leslie Powell. Sweeney wore a light-blue gown similar to the bridesmaids. She is reported to be close with the Powell family.

articles.title: Sydney Sweeney And Glen Powell's Latest Outing Fuels Romance Rumors After Jonathan Davino Split
articles.details: Sydney Sweeney and Glen Powell's appearance together at Leslie Powell's wedding reignited romance rumors amid Sweeney's split from fiance Jonathan Davino. Despite the speculation, sources claim they attended the event as friends.

articles.title: Sydney Sweeney Attends Glen Powell’s Sister’s Wedding Amid Jonathan Davino Split Reports
articles.details: Sydney Sweeney was present at Leslie Powell's wedding along with Glen Powell. Their outing sparked rumors after Sweeney reportedly ended her engagement with Jonathan Davino. She has been close friends with the Powell family for a long time.

articles.title: Sydney Sweeney and Fiancé Jonathan Davino Break Up After 7 Years
articles.details: Reports suggest Sydney Sweeney and Jonathan Davino have called off their engagement after being together for seven years. They have been having issues due to Sweeney's busy career.

articles.title: All about Sydney Sweeney and Glen Powell's outing amid her 'rocky' relationship with Jonathan Davino
articles.details: Sydney Sweeney participated in the wedding celebrations of Glen Powell's sister, Leslie Powell, stirring up relationship rumors due to her own rocky engagement status with Jonathan Davino. Sources indicate Sweeney's ties to the Powell family are longstanding.

articles.title: Sydney Sweeney’s blue corset dress hints she may have played a larger role in Glen Powell’s family wedding
articles.details: Sydney Sweeney was seen at Leslie Powell's wedding, wearing a blue corset dress matching the bridal party color. She attended with her best friend, confirming she was not Glen Powell's date.

articles.title: Texas Longhorns coach Sydney Carter used to be criticized for her courtside looks. Now she's celebrated for them.
articles.summary: Sydney Carter, assistant coach and director of player development at the University of Texas at Austin, has played a critical role in the success of the women’s basketball team. While gaining attention for her game day fashion, Carter's style, once criticized, is now celebrated for its expression of individuality and empowerment, inspiring her players.

articles.title: Texas wins Lone Star State showdown over TCU to advance to fourth women’s Final Four
articles.summary: The Texas Longhorns women's basketball team defeated TCU 58-47 in the Elite Eight, securing their place in the Final Four for the first time since 2003. Key players included Madison Booker and Rori Harmon, with significant performances in a defensive battle.

articles.title: South Carolina women's basketball vs Texas prediction, pick for 2025 NCAA Tournament Final Four
articles.summary: South Carolina Gamecocks will face Texas Longhorns in the Final Four. The Gamecocks, led by coach Dawn Staley, have a season record of 2-1 against Texas, and both teams have shown strong performances throughout the tournament.

articles.title: Texas Named a Finalist For Elite Transfer
articles.summary: Texas is a finalist for Nevada transfer Nick Davidson, who is also considering other schools. With the firing of head coach Rodney Terry and the appointment of Sean Miller, Texas aims to enhance its team dynamics amid challenges and changes.

articles.title: Texas Longhorns end 22-year Final Four drought with win over TCU in Elite Eight
articles.summary: After a 22-year hiatus, Texas Longhorns women's basketball team returns to the Final Four. Their win against TCU was marked by strategic plays and a strong finish, breaking previous season win records.

articles.title: Final Four 2025: Who does Texas play next in NCAA Tournament?
articles.summary: Texas will play South Carolina in the NCAA Tournament's Final Four. The matchup is highly anticipated, with previous close contests between the two teams in the regular season. The game is set to be held at Amalie Arena in Tampa, featuring notable players like Madison Booker.

article_details.title: Sydney Sweeney Attends Glen Powell’s Sister’s Wedding Amid Jonathan Davino Split Reports
details: Sydney Sweeney attended the wedding of Glen Powell's sister, Leslie Powell, over the weekend in Dallas, Texas.
This attendance occurred amid reports that Sweeney called off her engagement to Jonathan Davino.
Sweeney and Powell have denied rumors of a romantic relationship, maintaining they are friends.
Sweeney wore a light-blue gown similar to the bridesmaids' dresses, but it was not confirmed she was a part of the bridal party.

title: Texas Longhorns coach Sydney Carter used to be criticized for her courtside looks. Now she's celebrated for them.

content.headline: Texas wins Lone Star State showdown over TCU to advance to fourth women’s Final Four
content.summary: The Texas Longhorns have advanced to the Final Four of the women’s NCAA basketball tournament after defeating TCU 58-47. The game took place at Legacy Arena in Birmingham, Alabama. This marks Texas' first Final Four appearance since 2003.

content.headline: South Carolina women's basketball vs Texas prediction, pick for 2025 NCAA Tournament Final Four
content.summary: The article discusses the upcoming game between South Carolina Gamecocks and Texas Longhorns in the NCAA Tournament Final Four, providing analysis and predictions for the matchup.

content.headline: Texas Named a Finalist For Elite Transfer
content.summary: Texas is one of the finalists for Nevada transfer Nick Davidson. Davidson is a top prospect in the On3 Transfer Portal Industry Rankings, considering several teams including Virginia, Washington, and Clemson.

content.headline: Texas Longhorns end 22-year Final Four drought with win over TCU in Elite Eight
content.summary: The Texas Longhorns women's basketball team ended a 22-year absence from the Final Four with a victory over TCU. The win secures their place in the Final Four, where they will face South Carolina.

content.headline: Final Four 2025: Who does Texas play next in NCAA Tournament?
content.summary: After defeating TCU, the Texas Longhorns will play the South Carolina Gamecocks in the NCAA Tournament Final Four. The article discusses the game's timing, location, and broadcast details.

content.headline: Sydney Carter celebrated for her courtside looks
content.summary: Sydney Carter, an assistant coach and director of player development for Texas Longhorns, is recognized not only for her coaching but also for her distinctive fashion style at games. Her courtside fashion, which was once criticized, is now a source of inspiration for her players and followers.
